benefits.description: Worked well for intended purpose before allergic reaction developed

side_effects.description: Initially red welt at injection site, then progressed to massive allergic reaction with welts covering body, bright red skin, anal burning sensation

protocol_notes: Developed allergy to TB-500 over time. Tried micro doses from different vendors, experienced reactions to all of them. Wanted to continue use due to efficacy but developed allergic hypersensitivity.
